replies.msg:
請問一下城大 10月29日 嗰個係咪如期舉行呀, 事關我啱啱收到 CityU Alumni Relations Office 既 email:

Rumour of an unauthorised forum to be held on 29 October at CityU
Dear colleagues, students and alumni,

The University is aware that rumors circulating on the Internet suggests a forum will be held next Tuesday (29 October) at Wong’s International Terrace. The University is concerned about outsiders claiming to hold such an event on CityU campus.

We must clarify that:
The University is not the organiser of this unauthorised event;
The venue of the unauthorised event has already been reserved a long time ago for a CityU event on that day;
Long-established procedures and mechanisms are in place for CityU staff and students to apply for the use of venues. The regulations for the use of campus facilities clearly state that venue usage must not involve any commercial, political, profit-related and/or personal activities.
We are extremely concerned that if a large number of people gather on campus for an unauthorised event in that evening, the normal operation and learning activities of the University will be adversely affected. In addition, in case unexpected or disorderly incidents occur during the event, the University will not have sufficient personnel to implement crowd management measures or take contingency actions.

The University maintains autonomy and neutrality. It does not support any individual’s particular political viewpoints and we repeat that campus is not a place for political wrestling. We call on every member of the campus community to respect the University’s position. Outsiders must not enter campus and disrupt the normal operations of the University.

The University reserves all rights to go after any offenders.

Communications and Public Relations Office
25 October 2019

擅自於10月29日在城大舉辦論壇的傳言
各位同事、同學和校友：

大學留意到近日網上流傳將於下星期二（10月29日）傍晚在王氏國際廣場舉辦論壇。對於有校外人士聲稱將於城大校園舉行論壇，大學深表關注。

我們必須澄清以下各點：
大學不是該未經申請活動的主辦機構；
該未經申請活動擬使用的地點，早已被預留當天作校內活動用途；
大學有既定程序及機制供本校教職員及學生申請使用場地。而在使用大學設施的守則中，已清楚列明校園內不可以進行任何商業、政治、牟利及個人活動。
我們非常關注當晚如有大量校外人士擅自聚集校園進行未經申請活動，勢必嚴重影響校園的正常運作及教學活動。同時，屆時一旦出現突發事故或混亂情況，大學亦沒有足夠人手作出人群管理及應變。

大學恪守自主、保持中立，並不支持任何個人的特定政治觀點，亦非政治角力的場所。我們呼籲大學社群內的每一位為此付出努力，校外人士不得干擾大學，更不應該進入校園干擾大學的正常運作。

大學對任何人士闖入校園舉辦或參與未經批准的活動保留追究的權利。

傳訊及公關處啟
2019年10月25日
